name: components/icon-item
description: Compact icon + title + one-liner tile for short-copy grids and rows.

usage: Use for short points: one title plus one sentence, optionally with an icon glyph in .ls-icon-badge.
Content-sized by design; grids and stacks of icon items compose as balanced bands.

composition.copyGuidance: One short title and one sentence per item; longer copy belongs in components/card.
avoidWhen: a point needs multiple sentences of explanation or a large visual

alternatives.when: each point carries 2-4 sentences or a visual

useCases: Present 3-6 short points as compact icon tiles or rows.
